item.title: Patreon 不再要求人工智能机器人不要抓取数据，而是开始阻止它们
item.summary: Patreon is strengthening its defenses against AI scraping by working with Cloudflare to block bots that train AI models on creators’ content without permission. The move marks a shift away from relying on websites using robots.txt alone to actively block unauthorized AI training.
